title: Virginia DDS Analyst Pay Bands + DDS-Internal Starting Salaries (DHRM Structure, eff 2025-06-10)
description: Machine-readable Virginia classified pay-band structure (min/max only — VA uses wide pay-band ranges, not stepped grids) for both Statewide (SW) and Northern Virginia (NoVA) areas, bands 1–9. Includes a role-to-band crosswalk for the DDS Analyst series (Trainee 1 #ARSD0134, Journey #ARSD0315, Junior #ARSD0436 → Band 4; Supervisor — Line Unit #ARSD0252 → Band 5) and the more informative DARS DDS-internal FY26 starting salaries ($54,106 Trainee 1 → $69,479 Junior; $105,212 Supervisor). Extracted from the DHRM FY26 salary-structure PDF (extraction_status complete).

columns.name: pay_bands.<area>.<band>.min
columns.description: Pay-band annual minimum for the area (SW or NoVA), bands 1–9.

columns.name: pay_bands.<area>.<band>.max
columns.description: Pay-band annual maximum (band 9 max is the string 'Market', not a number).

columns.name: role_band_assignments
columns.description: Crosswalk from DDS Analyst / Supervisor role code to pay band.

columns.name: dds_internal_starting_salaries_fy26
columns.description: DARS DDS-internal FY26 starting salary by role — the realistic hiring rate, narrower than the band range.

source.publisher: Virginia Department of Human Resource Management (DHRM); DARS Disability Determination Services Division
source.title: Virginia Classified Salary Structure effective 2025-06-10 (FY26) + DARS DDS internal salary model

update_cadence: annual (fiscal-year salary structure; FY26 applied a 3% increase)
notes: Authoritative: pay-band min/max parsed from the official DHRM FY26 salary-structure PDF for both SW and NoVA areas. CAVEAT: VA pay bands are extremely wide so the band 'max' figures are misleading on their own — use dds_internal_starting_salaries_fy26 as the realistic comparator. Band 9 max is the literal string 'Market' (no numeric ceiling). No collective bargaining for VA state employees.
